settings.heading: Farewell Trophy & Memento Ideas & Awards
settings.subheading: Heartfelt farewell mementos and trophies for colleagues, seniors and students leaving — engraved keepsakes, group-signed plaques and photo mementos. Custom-made by Meru Trophy.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: For a farewell, popular picks are engraved wooden or crystal keepsakes, group-signed plaques and photo mementos carrying the person's name, time together and warm wishes — from around ₹300. Meru Trophy makes single pieces or sets. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: The right award for the moment
settings.text: A farewell memento says "we'll remember you." Lead with the person's name, the time shared and a warm message; choose wood for warmth or crystal for ceremony, and consider a photo or space for team signatures. Perfect for colleagues, seniors and graduating students.

settings.title: Engraved keepsake
settings.text: Wood or crystal with name and message.

settings.title: Group-signed plaque
settings.text: Space for team names and notes.

settings.title: Photo memento
settings.text: A shared moment, printed and engraved.

settings.question: What's a good farewell gift memento?
settings.answer: An engraved wood or crystal keepsake with the person's name, your time together and a warm message — optionally a photo or signatures.

settings.question: Can the team sign it?
settings.answer: Yes — group-signed plaques leave space for names and short notes.

settings.question: Can you make several for a graduating batch?
How fast can you deliver?
settings.answer: Single pieces turn around fast; tell us your date.

settings.heading: Planning a farewell?
settings.text: Tell us the occasion, recipient and date — we'll share designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
